description: Well cushioned and lightweight, these shoes are designed to offer a comfortable user experience coupled with style. Team them with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic perforate upper for maximum ventilationSuede overlays over the upper for durabilityCushioned sock liner for snug FitSynthetic tongue with synthetic lining for snug and comfort fitBrand marks on the sides and the tongueMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorptionCushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with vertical flex grooves for flexible movement of the feetDotted outsole for maximum tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
